message.content:
@startuml
title create order sequence diagram

actor Customer
actor Cashier

participant ":Inventory System" as IS
participant ":Order" as O
participant ":Product" as P
participant ":Stock" as S
participant ":Invoice" as I
participant ":Transaction" as T

Customer -> Cashier : 1. Request order product
Cashier --> Customer : 2. Receive order

Cashier -> IS : 3. requestCreateOrder()
activate IS

IS -> P : 3.1 selectProduct()
activate P
P -> S : 3.2 checkStock()
activate S
S --> P : 3.3 return stock
deactivate S
P --> IS : 3.4 return product
deactivate P

alt [IF (stock.qty > order.qty)]
  IS -> O : 3.5 createOrder(order)
  activate O
  O -> S : 3.6 updateStock()
  activate S
  S --> IS : 3.7 return update stock
  deactivate S

  O -> I : 3.8 systemCreateInvoice()
  activate I
  I -> I : 3.9 printInvoice()
  I --> IS : 3.10 return invoice
  deactivate I

  O --> IS : 3.11 return order
  deactivate O
else [ELSE]
  O --> IS : 3.12 can't create order
end

IS --> Cashier : 4. response create order status
deactivate IS

Cashier --> Customer : 5. Invoice
@enduml
